query:
SELECT cu.id, cu.name, cu.email, cu.tenantId, cu.status, cu.role, cu.createdAt, t.name as tenantName 
FROM crm_users cu 
LEFT JOIN saas_tenants t ON cu.tenantId = t.id 
WHERE cu.email LIKE '%marcio%' OR cu.email LIKE '%boxtour%'
ORDER BY cu.createdAt DESC;
